# Change Management in Digital Transformation

- [Change Management In Digital Transformation](https://www.forbes.com/sites/forrester/2023/06/23/change-management-in-digital-transformation/)
- [Digital Transformation Management: An Insightful Guide](https://www.prosci.com/blog/digital-transformation-management-success)
- [Change management for digital transformation: The three best strategies](https://www.celonis.com/blog/change-management-for-digital-transformation-the-three-best-strategies/)


# Agile Project Management

- [Agile project management](https://www.apm.org.uk/resources/find-a-resource/agile-project-management/)

# Scrum

- [What is scrum and how to get started](https://www.atlassian.com/agile/scrum)
- [What is Scrum?](https://aws.amazon.com/what-is/scrum/)
- [Scrum](https://www.agilealliance.org/glossary/scrum/)
